source: preview cohort in eval/cases/approved/preview-run; production cohort in eval/cases/approved/prod-run (cases 101-200)

selection_policy.quick_holdout: 1 holdout from the same insurer + denial_type + sub_tactic slice
selection_policy.serious_train: 5 production training cases; each holdout slice has at least 2 same-slice siblings
selection_policy.serious_holdout: 2 holdout cases on different insurers (Aetna + UHC), distinct from preview Cigna slice
